hero.title: CNC Smart Tool Cabinet
hero.subtitle: Intelligent Storage & Management Solution
hero.description: Revolutionize your tool management with Qiuyan smart cabinets. RFID tracking, real-time inventory monitoring, automated dispensing and recovery — achieve closed-loop tool management for your manufacturing facility.
cta.readyTitle: Let's Build Your Intelligent Storage Solution
cta.readyDesc: Contact our team for a free consultation. We'll help you find the perfect smart cabinet system for your needs.
company.name: Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology Co., Ltd.
company.tagline: Leader in Intelligent Tool Management Solutions
about.hero.title: About Qiuyan Technology
about.hero.description: Since our founding in 2015, Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology has focused on the R&D and manufacturing of smart tool cabinets, vending machines, and smart lockers, providing premium intelligent storage solutions to customers in over 60 countries and regions worldwide. Driven by technological innovation, we are committed to becoming a global leader in intelligent storage.
about.title: About Qiuyan Technology
about.description: Guangzhou Qiuyan Technology Co., Ltd. is a national high-tech enterprise dedicated to providing comprehensive intelligent tool management and material storage solutions for industrial manufacturing, education & research, healthcare, and more.
about.intro.title: Deep Expertise in Intelligent Storage, Empowering Global Manufacturing
about.intro.text1: The core team of Qiuyan Technology consists of engineers and technical experts with over 20 years of industry experience. We integrate German Industry 4.0 concepts with our proprietary intelligent control systems to create industry-leading smart tool cabinet systems. Our products are widely used in high-end manufacturing fields including CNC machining centers, aerospace, automotive manufacturing, electronics assembly, rail transit, and power energy — helping clients achieve digital and intelligent transformation of tool management.
about.intro.text2: Headquartered in Panyu District, Guangzhou, China, we operate a 15,000 sq.m modern production base with complete R&D, production, quality control, sales, and after-sales service systems. We adhere to the business philosophy of 'Quality First, Customer Foremost', continuously optimizing product performance and enhancing user experience. Our products have been exported to over 60 countries across Europe, America, Middle East, Southeast Asia, and Oceania, with 12 global service support centers helping customers achieve intelligent upgrades worldwide.
about.timeline.title: Our Journey
about.timeline.subtitle: From startup to industry leader — Qiuyan's remarkable decade
about.timeline.2015.title: Company Founded
about.timeline.2015.description: Registered in Panyu District, Guangzhou. Initial team of 5 people, focused on smart tool cabinet R&D.
about.timeline.2016.title: First Product Launch
about.timeline.2016.description: The DL series smart tool cabinet successfully launched, gaining recognition from 20 manufacturing customers.
about.timeline.2017.title: ISO Certification
about.timeline.2017.description: Passed ISO 9001 quality management system certification and established standardized production processes.
about.timeline.2018.title: Product Line Expansion
about.timeline.2018.description: Launched vending machine series and smart locker series, forming a three-product-line战略布局.
about.timeline.2019.title: Overseas Market Breakthrough
about.timeline.2019.description: Products exported to Southeast Asia and European markets for the first time, embarking on international expansion.
about.timeline.2021.title: National High-Tech Certification
about.timeline.2021.description: Awarded National High-Tech Enterprise certification, with 10 utility model patents accumulated.
about.timeline.2022.title: Smart Manufacturing Base
about.timeline.2022.description: New Panyu production base officially put into operation, with annual production capacity increased to 5,000 units.
about.timeline.2023.title: Global Expansion Accelerated
about.timeline.2023.description: Products entered North American and Middle Eastern markets, with overseas sales exceeding 40% of total revenue.
about.timeline.2024.title: Industry Leadership Established
about.timeline.2024.description: Served 500+ customers worldwide, products covering 60+ countries and regions, firmly established in the industry's top tier.
about.values.title: Core Values
about.values.subtitle: Five core values drive us forward, creating long-term value for our customers
about.values.innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
about.values.innovation.description: Investing over 8% of annual revenue in R&D, with a dedicated R&D center and a 15-member R&D team, continuously launching industry-leading technologies and products.
about.values.quality.title: Excellence in Quality
about.values.quality.description: Executing 38 quality inspection processes from raw material procurement to finished product delivery, we maintain a product defect rate below 0.3‰, far better than the industry average.
about.values.service.title: Dedicated Service
about.values.service.description: Established a 7×24-hour global customer service system, with a commitment to respond to faults within 4 hours and provide solutions within 48 hours. Customer satisfaction has remained above 98% for 5 consecutive years.
about.values.customer.title: Customer First
about.values.customer.description: Deeply understanding customer needs, providing end-to-end services from solution design and product customization to installation, commissioning, and after-sales training. We strive to be our customers' most trusted long-term partner.
about.values.global.title: Global Vision
about.values.global.description: Products have passed CE, FCC, RoHS, and other international certifications, exported to 60+ countries across Europe, America, the Middle East, and Southeast Asia, with local service partners in 10 countries.
about.certificationsText: Qiuyan Technology places high importance on quality management system development. We have passed multiple international authoritative certifications to ensure every product meets the world's highest industry standards.
about.factory.title: Smart Manufacturing Workshop
about.factory.subtitle: 15,000 sq.m modern production facility — full control from design to delivery
about.capabilities.designDesc: Our 15-member professional R&D team invests over 8% of annual revenue in technology development. We hold 10+ utility model patents and 3 software copyrights, with full-stack capabilities spanning hardware design, embedded systems development, and cloud platform architecture. Every product undergoes a rigorous 6+ month testing cycle before release.
about.capabilities.manufacturingDesc: Equipped with TRUMPF laser cutters, AMADA CNC press brakes, YASKAWA robotic welding stations, and other advanced equipment. We execute 38 standardized production processes with critical dimension tolerance within ±0.05mm. Annual capacity reaches 5,000 units to meet rapid large-order delivery requirements.
about.capabilities.qualityDesc: ISO 9001 certified with a three-tier quality control system: incoming inspection, in-process inspection, and final inspection. Every unit undergoes 72-hour burn-in testing and comprehensive functional verification before shipment. Our defect rate is maintained below 0.3‰ — far exceeding industry standards.
